channel.title: Features on The Median Duck
channel.description: Recent content in Features on The Median Duck

item.title: Comment, Like, Subscribe!
item.description: Your Task Extra, Extra! Read All About It! Be the First to Say “First!” What Have We Learnt Today? Your Task Never miss a The Median Duck post; most up-to-date reader wins! Participate in The Median Duck Peanut Gallery chatter; most active reader wins! Figure 1: Daddy’s interest has been piqued…and is disappointed by the lack of apostrophe for ‘Papas attention’. Extra, Extra! Read All About It! Readers! Have you found it highly inconvenient to find out if there is a newly published Median Duck post?
